title: Update project-spec and verify all query modes
description: Add variant-annotation to endpoints table in docs/project-spec.md. Run ruff check, start server, test all query modes (variant, region, gene, POST batch), test JSON format, test error cases (invalid source, missing params).

title: Remove old variant_annotation endpoints from genes.py
description: Remove old hidden variant_annotation_range and variant_annotation POST endpoints from app/routers/genes.py. These use sync subprocess against gnomAD, replaced by new endpoint.

title: Wire service container, dependencies, and server
description: Register VariantAnnotationService in app/core/service_container.py. Add get_variant_annotation_service() to app/dependencies.py. Import and include variant_annotation router in app/server.py with tags=['variant-annotation'].

title: Create variant_annotation router
description: New app/routers/variant_annotation.py. GET /variant_annotation/{source} with query params variant/region/gene/format. POST /variant_annotation/{source} with body {variants: list[str]}. Gene queries resolved via GeneNameAndPositionMapping. Use range_response() for TSV/JSON output.

title: Create VariantAnnotationService
description: New app/services/variant_annotation_service.py inheriting GCloudTabixBase. Methods: get_available_sources(), get_header(source), stream_by_range(source, chr, start, end), stream_by_variants(source, variants). Variant filtering via private _filter_by_variants() async generator. Reuse _stream_range(), _cache_header() from base class.

title: Add variant_annotation_sources config to profiles
description: Add variant_annotation_sources dict to app/config/profiles/daly/common.py and app/config/profiles/finngen/common.py with finngen file paths. Re-export from app/config/common.py. Daly: gs://daly-genetics-results/variant_annotations/R13_annotated_variants_v0.small.gz, Finngen: gs://finngen-commons/results_api_data/variant_annotations/R13_annotated_variants_v0.small.gz

title: Feature: Variant Annotation API Endpoint
description: New /api/v1/variant_annotation/{source} endpoint serving FinnGen variant annotation data from tabix-indexed files on GCS. Supports query by variant list, chromosome range, and gene name. GET for single queries, POST for batch. Streams TSV/JSON. Source path param allows future annotation sources beyond finngen. File: R13_annotated_variants_v0.small.gz with columns: variant, chr, pos, ref, alt, INFO, AF, AC_Het, AC_Hom, most_severe, gene_most_severe, rsid, EXOME_enrichment_nfe, GENOME_enrichment_nfe, index.
